graphs.title: Dependency Graph
graphs.summary: Module and external dependency relationships used for coupling, cycles, and structural pressure.

graphs.title: Architecture Graph
graphs.summary: Repository, package, and module boundary structure used for cohesion and boundary inspection.

graphs.title: Data Flow Graph
graphs.summary: Inferred reads, writes, emits, and external data interactions used for ownership, bottleneck, and security inspection.

graphs.title: Interface Graph
graphs.summary: Public interfaces, entrypoints, and their consumers used for API and integration analysis.

graphs.title: Operational Risk Graph
graphs.summary: Inferred observability and security capability coverage used for diagnosability and trust-boundary inspection.
